description: Si riferisce alla sensazione del sapore in bocca. I sapori dolci tendono ad essere morbidi, lisci e confortevoli, mentre i sapori amari possono essere astringenti, secchi o ruvidi.
positive: The custard felt incredibly smooth, a velvety caress on my tongue, *molto delicato*.
A gentle sweetness coats the palate, leaving a soft, comforting sensation, *comme un nuage*.
Das Schokoladenmousse schmolz sanft auf der Zunge, eine unglaublich weiche Textur.
The honey’s mouthfeel was pure silk, a luxurious experience for the taste buds, *tan suave*.
The ripe pear puree offered a gentle, yielding texture, almost melting away, *dolce e confortante*.
A smooth cream glaze, *très agréable* in its softness, enveloped the entire mouth.
The vanilla pudding had a lovely, yielding mouthfeel, a truly comforting sensation, *una carezza*.
This dulce de leche is remarkably smooth, a gentle hug for the palate, *sensazione di benessere*.
The milk chocolate's texture was incredibly soft, a pleasant surprise, *una dolcezza vellutata*.
The yogurt, *muy suave*, flowed effortlessly across my tongue, leaving a comforting feeling.
The panna cotta’s texture was divinely smooth, a pleasure to experience, *una sensazione delicata*.
This crème anglaise is exceptionally smooth, a truly comforting texture, *un piacere delicato*.
The banana puree felt silky smooth, a gentle and pleasant sensation, *molto piacevole*.
The coconut cream’s mouthfeel was unbelievably smooth, *un délice*.
The mascarpone’s texture was like soft velvet, a truly luxurious experience, *una morbidezza sublime*.
The melted caramel felt incredibly smooth and soft on the tongue, *un tocco di lusso*.
The peach puree, *muy delicada*, coated my mouth with a soft, comforting texture.
This whipped cream is so smooth, a delightful sensation in the mouth, *una sensazione di morbidezza*.
The white chocolate’s mouthfeel was exceptionally smooth, a truly comforting experience, *un sapore vellutato*.
The mango mousse felt silky and smooth, a pleasant and comforting sensation, *una dolcezza avvolgente*.
negative: The black tea left a dry, astringent feeling, *una sensazione sgradevole*.
This grapefruit juice is intensely astringent, leaving a puckering sensation, *très désagréable*.
The unsweetened cocoa powder felt rough and astringent on my tongue, *un sapore sgradevole*.
Das Sauerkirschgelee hatte eine unangenehm zusammenziehende Textur.
The green tea's mouthfeel was intensely astringent, a rather unpleasant sensation, *una sensazione ruvida*.
This quince paste felt surprisingly astringent, leaving a dry and puckering sensation, *un sapore amaro*.
The rhubarb’s mouthfeel was quite astringent, a rather unpleasant experience, *una sensazione di secchezza*.
The cranberry juice left a distinctly astringent aftertaste, *muy desagradable*.
This persimmon felt intensely astringent, a rather unpleasant sensation, *una sensazione fastidiosa*.
The bitter melon’s texture was surprisingly astringent, a rather dry and rough feeling, *un sapore amaro e ruvido*.
This radicchio had a harsh, astringent mouthfeel, *una sensazione sgradevole*.
The artichoke heart felt astringent and dry, a decidedly unpleasant sensation, *un sapore amaro*.
The pomegranate juice left a distinctly astringent feeling, *una sensazione sgradevole*.
This unsweetened lemon juice felt intensely astringent, *un délice*... ironico.
The raw spinach leaves had a rough, astringent mouthfeel, *una sensazione sgradevole*.
The chicory coffee left a bitter and astringent taste, *un sapore amaro*.
The unripe pear felt rough and astringent, *una sensazione spiacevole*.
This bitter orange marmalade is quite astringent, leaving a dry sensation, *muy amargo*.
The dark chocolate, *molto amaro*, had a distinctly astringent mouthfeel, *una sensazione sgradevole*.
The unsweetened grapefruit felt harsh and astringent, a decidedly unpleasant experience, *un sapore sgradevole*.
